_comment: Installer size baseline (bytes) for Task #1015 / T58 size guard. Per-extension entries; checked by scripts/check-installer-size.mjs. Bump only via dedicated PR with reviewer sign-off (NEVER auto-commit from CI). Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/v0.3-fragments/frag-11-packaging.md §11.5(6).
_rebaselined_2026_05_01: PR #765 — replaced placeholder estimates with first real CI measurements from runs/25219450679. Original baseline was a frag-11 §11.5(6) component-sum estimate (~125-146 MB per ext) but real builds carry additional weight from Sentry/OTel observability deps + AppImage AppRun stub + intentional SDK duplication for loadSdk() shim. Numbers below = observed bytes (not rounded MB) so future deltas are precise. Rebaseline rationale documented in PR body + frag-11 §11.5(6).
